description_long: This is a porcelain cup with a deep cobalt blue exterior, adorned with a repeating gold floral motif around the upper circumference. The rim and base are white, providing a striking contrast to the blue body. The cup features a single, angular handle, also colored blue, attached to one side. The interior is entirely white and smooth, typical of fine ceramic drinkware. The gold detailing is delicate and ornate, suggesting a decorative or possibly vintage style. The cup's overall form is cylindrical with a slightly flared rim and a gently tapering base.
description: A cobalt blue porcelain cup with gold floral patterns, white rim and base, and a blue angular handle. The interior is smooth and white.
description_view_0: The cup is shown with its handle on the right, highlighting the gold floral motif and the contrast between the blue body and white rim.
description_view_1: The handle is centered and fully visible from the back, with the gold pattern partially visible on either side.
description_view_2: The handle is on the left, and the gold floral motif is prominent on the blue surface, with the white rim and base clearly visible.
description_view_3: The cup is shown from the side opposite the handle, displaying an uninterrupted view of the gold floral pattern on the blue background.
